name: CLIP Software Lawn Care Management API
what_it_does: CLIP Software REST API for lawn care and landscaping business management software. Enables AI agents to manage customer accounts and property records, schedule lawn maintenance and landscaping jobs, optimize crew routing and dispatching, handle estimates and invoicing, track recurring service schedules, process payments, access job profitability data, and integrate lawn care operations with accounting and payroll systems.
use_cases: Scheduling and routing lawn care crews from field service automation agents
Managing customer accounts and recurring service contracts from billing agents
Processing estimates and invoices from revenue management agents
Tracking job profitability and crew performance from analytics agents
not_for: Arborist or tree care without lawn maintenance focus
Large commercial landscaping without residential lawn service workflows
Pest control without lawn care integration
best_when: A lawn care or landscaping company using CLIP Software wants AI agents to automate scheduling, routing, billing, and customer management workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer property data and employee routing information requires careful handling. Employee location tracking data may have labor law implications.

auth.notes: CLIP Software uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials. No granular scope control. Limited public developer documentation. Integration via export/import and third-party connectors.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly pricing; CLIP Xtra for advanced features
pricing.notes: Gaithersburg, Maryland. Founded 1984. One of the oldest lawn care software platforms. Long-time green industry stalwart. Desktop and cloud versions available. Competes with Service Autopilot and Jobber for lawn care management. Legacy-friendly for long-time users.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer property and employee routing data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key only
No webhooks — requires polling for schedule and job updates
Legacy platform (since 1984) — API reflects older design patterns
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
Limited public documentation — integration may require vendor support
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer property and field service data. PCI-DSS. API key only. US data residency. Legacy platform with limited documentation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer and field service data. PCI-DSS. API key only. US data residency. Legacy platform.
